documentation: # qoqo_for_braket_devices Braket devices interface for the qoqo quantum toolkit by [HQS Quantum Simulations](https://quantumsimulations.de). In order to make the update a device instance with Braket's information possible, the user has to run the following code before using this package: ```python TODO ``` ### Installation We provide pre-built binaries for linux, macos and windows on x86_64 hardware and macos on arm64. Simply install the pre-built wheels with ```shell pip install qoqo-for-braket-devices ``` ## General Braket is under the Apache-2.0 license ( see https://github.com/aws/amazon-braket-sdk-python/blob/main/LICENSE ). qoqo_for_braket_devices itself is also provided under the Apache-2.0 license. ## Testing This software is still in the beta stage. Functions and documentation are not yet complete and breaking changes can occur. If you find unexpected behaviour please open a github issue.
